bead.title: perf: lock final FEAT-008 budget numbers
bead.description: After C2 produces gating numbers, lock them as the official budget in FEAT-008.
bead.acceptance: 1. FEAT-008 perf section has concrete numbers (replacing provisional). 2. Numbers match what the gating test enforces.
